text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby. If we take to this
once-in-a-lifetime stage, we might just be able to
get closer to Manhattan Cafe's friend.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe still has hopes of entering the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, according to Agnes Tachyon's
judgment, she's in no state to be attempting any
intense races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon prepares a running test for
Manhattan Cafe, who runs out of energy before
she can finish it. Seeing this, I realize I need to
consider our next steps very carefully.
